overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey exploring the Temple of Hades during golden hour. The player character walks around the massive stone temple, admiring the ancient Greek architecture, and stops at a coastal overlook to view the sunset over the sea.

events.description: moving from front entrance to right side walkway along temple wall

agents.ego_description: walking past the front entrance with flaming braziers and along the right side of the temple

large stone bowl with flames on a pedestal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the front of the Temple of Hades with two flaming braziers flanking the entrance stairs. The camera moves along the right side of the temple, revealing the massive stone columns and red banners against the warm sunset light.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple side walkway with column views

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall temple columns against the sky
moving into area with strong golden hour backlighting from the setting sun

agents.ego_description: walking along the temple side wall and looking up at the massive fluted columns

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow side path of the temple, the camera tilts up to admire the massive fluted columns and red banners. The setting sun creates dramatic backlighting, casting long golden rays across the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with pergola and sea view

events.description: exiting the enclosed temple walkway into the open garden overlook
camera pans right to look at the sea and distant mountain fortress

agents.ego_description: walking to the overlook edge to view the sunset over the sea and distant mountains

open view of the ocean with sun reflecting on the water
distant mountain with ancient fortress structures on top
bushes with purple flowers along the overlook path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide coastal overlook with a wooden pergola and stone bench. The camera pans to reveal a stunning view of the sunset over the sea, with a distant mountain fortress visible across the water.

events.description: returning from the open overlook to the temple side walkway
encountering a group of NPCs including a child and a dog

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the temple and passing NPCs including a child walking with a brown dog

notable_agents.action: child walking alongside an adult with a brown dog on the stone path

entered.detail: massive stone wall base of the temple with weathered blocks
decorative stone trellis with climbing plants
mature olive tree with gnarled trunk and green foliage

segments.scene_description: Returning from the overlook to the temple walkway, the scene features a stone lattice structure and olive trees. The player encounters NPCs including a child and a dog walking along the path, then continues toward the distant temple facade.

events.description: camera tilts up to examine the detailed column carvings and architecture

agents.ego_description: continuing along the temple wall looking up at the detailed column architecture

entered.detail: close-up view of fluted columns with decorative capitals
carved stone relief work on the temple entablature

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a close-up walk along the temple's side wall, with the camera tilting up to admire the detailed fluted columns and decorative stone friezes. The warm sunset light highlights the texture of the ancient stonework as the path continues along the massive structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the imposing architecture of the Temple of Hades to a wide, serene coastal vista. It begins at the temple entrance flanked by flaming braziers, moving along the right side to reveal massive stone columns and red banners bathed in warm sunset light. As the camera follows a narrow side path, it tilts upward to capture the dramatic backlighting and long golden rays casting across the fluted stone. The scene then opens from the temple's shadow into a wide coastal overlook featuring a wooden pergola and stone bench. Finally, the camera pans across the horizon to reveal a stunning view of the sunset over the sea with a distant mountain fortress visible across the water.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a scenic temple walkway toward the towering architectural details of the Temple of Hades. It begins by retreating from a coastal overlook, passing through a stone lattice structure and olive trees while encountering a child and a dog along the path. As the camera advances toward the distant temple facade, the open walkway narrows into a close-up approach along the massive side wall. The scene then shifts focus upward, tilting to admire the detailed fluted columns and decorative stone friezes. Finally, the warm sunset light intensifies, highlighting the weathered texture of the ancient stonework as the camera continues its journey along the structure.
